pillars.title: Equity Impact Assessment
pillars.summary: Standardised assessment for evaluating health program impacts across demographic and socioeconomic strata.

pillars.title: Community Health Governance
pillars.summary: Participatory governance model ensuring marginalised communities have decision-making authority over local services.

pillars.title: Digital Inclusion
pillars.summary: Policy framework for telehealth, digital records access, and remote care equity across connectivity tiers.

pillars.title: Accessible Public Health
pillars.summary: WCAG-aligned accessibility and multilingual requirements for all public health platforms.

pillars.title: Affordability Safeguards
pillars.summary: Cost thresholds ensuring no citizen spends more than 3% of household income on essential care.

pillars.title: Data Justice & Representation
pillars.summary: Inclusive data collection standards preventing algorithmic bias and ensuring equitable resource allocation.

frameworks.title: Equity Impact Assessment Framework
frameworks.summary: Standardized assessment for evaluating health program impacts across demographic and socioeconomic strata.

frameworks.title: Community Health Governance Standard
frameworks.summary: Participatory governance model ensuring marginalized communities have decision-making authority over local health services.

frameworks.title: Digital Inclusion Health Policy
frameworks.summary: Policy framework for telehealth, digital records access, and remote care equity across connectivity tiers.

frameworks.title: Socioeconomic Risk Scoring
frameworks.summary: Standard methodology for identifying at-risk populations and targeting equitable interventions.

frameworks.title: Algorithmic Bias Audit Protocol
frameworks.summary: Mandatory bias testing for all health AI systems with public disclosure of results and mitigation plans.

frameworks.title: Intersectional Health Equity Lens
frameworks.summary: Analytical framework addressing compounding barriers across race, gender, disability, income, and geography.

programs.title: Community Health Worker Corps
programs.summary: Trained community liaisons bridging digital health platforms with underserved neighborhoods and rural districts.

programs.title: Mobile Clinic Network
programs.summary: Deployable mobile clinics providing primary care, screenings, and health education in connectivity-limited regions.

programs.title: School-Based Wellness Initiative
programs.summary: Integrated wellness services in schools covering mental health, nutrition, and preventive care access.

programs.title: Home Monitoring Pilot
programs.summary: Remote patient monitoring devices connected to clinical dashboards for chronic condition management.

programs.title: Language Access Expansion
programs.summary: Interpreter services and translated materials for 24 languages covering 98% of citizen population.

programs.title: Affordability Subsidy Programme
programs.summary: Sliding-scale subsidies ensuring no household exceeds 3% income threshold for essential health services.

programs.title: Digital Navigator Network
programs.summary: Peer mentors assisting low-digital-literacy citizens with telehealth access, record portals, and appointment systems.

programs.title: Maternal Health Equity Track
programs.summary: Targeted prenatal and postpartum support addressing outcome disparities in underserved communities.

programs.title: Disability-Inclusive Health Design
programs.summary: Co-design sessions with disability communities ensuring all health platforms meet accessibility standards.

programs.title: Rural Specialist Telehealth Network
programs.summary: Virtual specialist consultations eliminating travel burden for rural citizens with complex conditions.

standards.title: Language Access Standard
standards.summary: Mandatory multilingual health materials and interpreter services for all public health communications.

standards.title: Affordability Benchmark
standards.summary: Cost thresholds for essential health services ensuring no citizen spends more than 3% of household income on care.

standards.title: Accessibility Compliance Tier
standards.summary: WCAG-aligned accessibility requirements for all digital health platforms and public health facilities.

standards.title: Telehealth Parity Standard
standards.summary: Remote care quality requirements ensuring digital consultations meet in-person standards.

standards.title: Community Governance Charter
standards.summary: Decision-making authority framework for community health councils with binding veto on local service changes.

standards.title: Health Data Representation Standard
standards.summary: Minimum demographic granularity requirements for health data collection preventing erasure of marginalized groups.

reports.title: Annual Health Equity Impact Report
reports.summary: Comprehensive assessment of equity framework effectiveness across all health programmes and populations.

reports.title: Digital Divide in Telehealth Access
reports.summary: Analysis of connectivity, device, and literacy barriers to remote care with targeted intervention recommendations.

reports.title: Community Governance Outcomes Review
reports.summary: Evaluation of community health council decisions, service changes, and citizen satisfaction metrics.

reports.title: Affordability Compliance Audit
reports.summary: Verification that 94% of households remain below 3% income threshold for essential health expenditures.
